title: Globe Spin Stories
description: A curiosity-first globe journal where kids imagine animals, plants, and places after landing in icy, jungle, desert, and ocean habitats.
learningGoals: Build curiosity about world places and habitats
Practice hot, cold, wet, dry, icy, leafy, sandy, and splashy vocabulary
Connect imagined animals and objects to broad habitat clues
interactionModel: observe-journal tap stickers to imagine what might belong in a habitat
feedbackModel: Every sticker is accepted with pop and sparkle SFX plus a delighted fact-line; the recap replays the globe story.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
